title: Temu: 60% Cashback (Uncapped, Excludes Temu Marketplace) @ Zip (App Required)
body:
Deal: Temu: 60% Cashback (Uncapped, Excludes Temu Marketplace) @ Zip (App Required)

[ATangk] I did see this but also Zip (profanity) up with their rewards promotion and gave everyone $100 (that they reversed).
Also, making a purchase right now will mean you need to pay it off immediately or you'll get charged $9.95. Also cashback only redeemable in intervals of $10.
[freelife] Yes that $100 stuff up was a stuff up indeed. And yes quite a few hoops
[ATangk] Did you actually get cashback from this promotion? I thought Zip cashbacks were supposed to be instant.
[hubs1982] I have always paid it off towards the end of the following month, so if a purchase is done now, then pay off on/before 31st July.
[Prostagma] @freelife where did you see this? I can’t see it anywhere in the t&c’s
Cashback does not apply to Temu marketplace purchases.
[freelife] When you try it you don't get cashback. It's not stated but now Temu marketplace is listed separately in the Zip app with no cashback
[Prostagma] I see. Hmm… If it’s not explicitly mentioned anywhere, maybe we can contest it?
[ThatDealsGuy] What on earth is Temu Marketplace and how is it different from Temu?
[freelife] I think independent retailers inside Temu. Temu marketplace is a separate listing inside Zip
[hawkeye93] Reminds me of Shopback with Zip it’s instant so no risk?
[freelife] I think you have to shop from within Zip which means you can't use other cashback offers. I could be wrong
[jimojr] Also 10% cashback on TGG.
Boost $39 Prepaid SIM, only $4 after cashback.
I’ve just purchased all three about an hour ago.
[jimojr] It stacks with the Apple AirPods 4 deal making it an even better overall deal.
I received the cashback instantly for The Good Guys and Temu, but the Boost payment is still pending, so the cashback still hasn’t been processed yet.
[Noob Noob] T&Cs say minimum $39 spend.
Did they still give you the cashback without issue?
And did you purchase all of them in a single order, or 3 separate ones?
[jimojr] Where did you see the $39 minimum spend? I placed three separate purchases, one each from The Good Guys, Temu, and Boost.
I received the cashback from TGG and Temu instantly and have already redeemed it. I'm still waiting for the Boost cashback to be processed.
[Noob Noob] Sorry, I meant just the Boost prepaid sim deal.
I was looking through it on the app and one of the conditions it shows was 'minimum $39 spend', so I was confused if their discounted price of $39 sim for $12 would void the cashback.
TGG and Temu are still fine though.
[jimojr] @Noob Noob: I didn’t check the terms and conditions, so that might be why the Boost cashback hasn’t come through yet.
[rpb] I only got 2% for TGG. Got 10 for Big W though
[jimojr] After I made a purchase on TGG, the cashback dropped to 2% as well, but after a few minutes it went back up to 10% again.
[freelife] 3rd parties who sell inside Temu without using Temu infrastructure I think?
[myfeetarehappy] So Temu website purchase ok if entered via the ZIP app?
[stopBeingMean] Rolled the dice. $1100 total purchased amount. I hope it goes well. Otherwise I will return my items.
[cooldog] Will market place purchase get cashback？
[hawkeye93] How do you identify which item is from marketplace?
[Navigator87] Can anyone confirm if cashback tracked? And
- can we only buy upto the limit of the zip pay account or higher?
- how is the cashback recieved? Into zip pay account?
[jimojr] I got the cashback instantly. It shows up under "Cashback Balance". Once your cashback balance reaches $10 or more, you can redeem it again and again, but the maximum redemption is $10 each time.
As for the credit limit, I think you can place another order after making a payment on your Zip account, but I haven't personally tested that.
[Navigator87] Thanks.
$10 max redemption each time seems strange. Of i place a $1000 order and get around 600 cashback itll take 60 times to use? Would be better if they allowed to use the amount to bpay a bill or something…
[jimojr] No, I think you can redeem the full $600 to your Zip Pay account. It’s just that each redemption is capped at $10. I'm not sure if there's a daily redemption limit thoug, I’ve never received that much cashback before.
